2603.16565.title: Deep Learning-Driven Black-Box Doherty Power Amplifier with Pixelated Output Combiner and Extended Efficiency Range
2603.16565.paper_summary: This article presents a deep learning-driven inverse design methodology for Doherty power amplifiers (PA) with multi-port pixelated output combiner networks. A deep convolutional neural network (CNN) is developed and trained as an electromagnetic (EM) surrogate model to accurately and rapidly predict the S-parameters of pixelated passive networks. By leveraging the CNN-based surrogate model within a blackbox Doherty framework and a genetic algorithm (GA)-based optimizer, we effectively synthesize complex Doherty combiners that enable an extended back-off efficiency range using fully symmetrical devices. As a proof of concept, we designed and fabricated two Doherty PA prototypes incorporating three-port pixelated combiners, implemented with GaN HEMT transistors. In measurements, both prototypes demonstrate a maximum drain efficiency exceeding 74% and deliver an output power surpassing 44.1 dBm at 2.75 GHz. Furthermore, a measured drain efficiency above 52% is maintained at the 9-dB back-off power level for both prototypes at the same frequency. To evaluate linearity and efficiency under realistic signal conditions, both prototypes are tested using a 20-MHz 5G new radio (NR)-like waveform exhibiting a peak-to-average power ratio (PAPR) of 9.0 dB. After applying digital predistortion (DPD), each design achieves an average power added efficiency (PAE) above 51%, while maintaining an adjacent channel leakage ratio (ACLR) better than -60.8 dBc.
2603.16565.paper_summary_zh: 這篇文章提出了一種基於深度學習的反向設計方法，用於具有多端口像素化輸出合併網路的Doherty功率放大器（PA）。開發並訓練了一個深度卷積神經網絡（CNN），作為電磁（EM）替代模型，以準確且快速地預測像素化被動網路的S參數。通過在黑箱Doherty框架內利用基於CNN的替代模型和基於遺傳算法（GA）的優化器，我們有效地合成了複雜的Doherty合併器，這些合併器使用完全對稱的設備，實現了擴展的後備效率範圍。作為概念驗證，我們設計並製造了兩個Doherty PA原型，這些原型包含三端口像素化合併器，並使用GaN HEMT晶體管實現。在測試中，兩個原型均顯示出超過74%的最大漏極效率，並在2.75 GHz下提供超過44.1 dBm的輸出功率。此外，在相同頻率下，兩個原型在9 dB後備功率水平下維持超過52%的測得漏極效率。為了在現實信號條件下評估線性和效率，對兩個原型進行了使用20 MHz 5G新無線（NR）類似波形的測試，該波形顯示出9.0 dB的峰均功率比（PAPR）。在應用數字預失真（DPD）後，每個設計的平均功率附加效率（PAE）均超過51%，同時保持相鄰信道泄漏比（ACLR）優於-60.8 dBc。
2603.16565.author: Han Zhou et.al.
2603.16565.authors: Han Zhou, Haojie Chang, David Widen
